arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: الر ۚ تِلْكَ آيَاتُ الْكِتَابِ وَقُرْآنٍ مُّبِينٍ
english translation text:
Alif, Lam, Ra. These are the signs of the Book and a manifest Quran.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: رُّبَمَا يَوَدُّ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا لَوْ كَانُوا مُسْلِمِينَ
english translation text:
Much will the faithless wish that they had been Muslims.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: ذَرْهُمْ يَأْكُلُوا وَيَتَمَتَّعُوا وَيُلْهِهِمُ الْأَمَلُ ۖ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
english translation text:
Leave them to eat and enjoy and to be diverted by longings. Soon they will know.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَمَا أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَرْيَةٍ إِلَّا وَلَهَا كِتَابٌ مَّعْلُومٌ
english translation text:
We did not destroy any town but that it had a known term.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: مَّا تَسْبِقُ مِنْ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلَهَا وَمَا يَسْتَأْخِرُونَ
english translation text:
No nation can advance its time nor can it defer it.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَقَالُوا يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِي نُزِّلَ عَلَيْهِ الذِّكْرُ إِنَّكَ لَمَجْنُونٌ
english translation text:
They said, ‘O you, to whom the Reminder has been sent down, you are indeed crazy.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: لَّوْ مَا تَأْتِينَا بِالْمَلَائِكَةِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ الصَّادِقِينَ
english translation text:
Why do you not bring us the angels should you be truthful?!’
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: مَا نُنَزِّلُ الْمَلَائِكَةَ إِلَّا بِالْحَقِّ وَمَا كَانُوا إِذًا مُّنظَرِينَ
english translation text:
We do not send down the angels except with due reason, and then they will not be granted any respite.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَزَّلْنَا الذِّكْرَ وَإِنَّا لَهُ لَحَافِظُونَ
english translation text:
Indeed We have sent down the Reminder, and indeed We will preserve it.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ فِي شِيَعِ الْأَوَّلِينَ
english translation text:
Certainly We sent [apostles] before you to former communities,
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا بِهِ يَسْتَهْزِئُونَ
english translation text:
and there did not come to them any apostle but that they used to deride him.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: كَذَٰلِكَ نَسْلُكُهُ فِي قُلُوبِ الْمُجْرِمِينَ
english translation text:
That is how We let it pass through the hearts of the guilty:
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِهِ ۖ وَقَدْ خَلَتْ سُنَّةُ الْأَوَّلِينَ
english translation text:
they do not believe in it, and the precedent of the ancients has already passed.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَلَوْ فَتَحْنَا عَلَيْهِم بَابًا مِّنَ السَّمَاءِ فَظَلُّوا فِيهِ يَعْرُجُونَ
english translation text:
Were We to open for them a gate of the sky, so that they could go on ascending through it,
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: لَقَالُوا إِنَّمَا سُكِّرَتْ أَبْصَارُنَا بَلْ نَحْنُ قَوْمٌ مَّسْحُورُونَ
english translation text:
they would surely say, ‘Indeed a spell has been cast on our eyes; indeed, we are a bewitched lot.’
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ جَعَلْنَا فِي السَّمَاءِ بُرُوجًا وَزَيَّنَّاهَا لِلنَّاظِرِينَ
english translation text:
Certainly We have appointed houses in the sky and adorned them for the onlookers,
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَحَفِظْنَاهَا مِن كُلِّ شَيْطَانٍ رَّجِيمٍ
english translation text:
and We have guarded them from every outcast Satan,
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: إِلَّا مَنِ اسْتَرَقَ السَّمْعَ فَأَتْبَعَهُ شِهَابٌ مُّبِينٌ
english translation text:
except someone who may eavesdrop, whereat there pursues him a manifest flame.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَالْأَرْضَ مَدَدْنَاهَا وَأَلْقَيْنَا فِيهَا رَوَاسِيَ وَأَنبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ شَيْءٍ مَّوْزُونٍ
english translation text:
And We spread out the earth, and cast in it firm mountains, and We grew in it every kind of balanced thing,
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَجَعَلْنَا لَكُمْ فِيهَا مَعَايِشَ وَمَن لَّسْتُمْ لَهُ بِرَازِقِينَ
english translation text:
and made in it [various] means of livelihood for you and for those whom you do not provide for.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَإِن مِّن شَيْءٍ إِلَّا عِندَنَا خَزَائِنُهُ وَمَا نُنَزِّلُهُ إِلَّا بِقَدَرٍ مَّعْلُومٍ
english translation text:
There is not a thing but that its sources are with Us, and We do not send it down except in a known measure.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَأَرْسَلْنَا الرِّيَاحَ لَوَاقِحَ فَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ السَّمَاءِ مَاءً فَأَسْقَيْنَاكُمُوهُ وَمَا أَنتُمْ لَهُ بِخَازِنِينَ
english translation text:
And We send the fertilizing winds and send down water from the sky providing it for you to drink and you are not maintainers of its resources.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَإِنَّا لَنَحْنُ نُحْيِي وَنُمِيتُ وَنَحْنُ الْوَارِثُونَ
english translation text:
Indeed it is We who give life and bring death and We are the inheritors.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْنَا الْمُسْتَقْدِمِينَ مِنكُمْ وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْنَا الْمُسْتَأْخِرِينَ
english translation text:
Certainly We know the predecessors among you and certainly We know the successors,
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ يَحْشُرُهُمْ ۚ إِنَّهُ حَكِيمٌ عَلِيمٌ
english translation text:
and indeed it is your Lord who will resurrect them. Indeed, He is all-wise, all-knowing.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ مِن صَلْصَالٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
english translation text:
Certainly We created man out of a dry clay [drawn] from an aging mud,
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَالْجَانَّ خَلَقْنَاهُ مِن قَبْلُ مِن نَّارِ السَّمُومِ
english translation text:
and We created the jinn earlier, out of a piercing fire.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِّن صَلْصَالٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
english translation text:
When your Lord said to the angels, ‘Indeed I am going to create a human out of a dry clay [drawn] from an aging mud.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: فَإِذَا سَوَّيْتُهُ وَنَفَخْتُ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِي فَقَعُوا لَهُ سَاجِدِينَ
english translation text:
So when I have proportioned him and breathed into him of My spirit, then fall down in prostration before him.’
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: فَسَجَدَ الْمَلَائِكَةُ كُلُّهُمْ أَجْمَعُونَ
english translation text:
Thereat the angels prostrated, all of them together,
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: إِلَّا إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰ أَن يَكُونَ مَعَ السَّاجِدِينَ
english translation text:
but not Iblis: he refused to be among those who prostrated.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: قَالَ يَا إِبْلِيسُ مَا لَكَ أَلَّا تَكُونَ مَعَ السَّاجِدِينَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘O Iblis! What kept you from being among those who have prostrated?’
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: قَالَ لَمْ أَكُن لِّأَسْجُدَ لِبَشَرٍ خَلَقْتَهُ مِن صَلْصَالٍ مِّنْ حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ
english translation text:
Said he, ‘I will not prostrate before a human whom You have created out of a dry clay [drawn] from an aging mud.’
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: قَالَ فَاخْرُجْ مِنْهَا فَإِنَّكَ رَجِيمٌ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Begone hence, for you are indeed an outcast,
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَإِنَّ عَلَيْكَ اللَّعْنَةَ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ الدِّينِ
english translation text:
and indeed the curse shall lie on you until the Day of Retribution.’
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنظِرْنِي إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘My Lord! Respite me till the day they will be resurrected.’
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: قَالَ فَإِنَّكَ مِنَ الْمُنظَرِينَ
english translation text:
Said He, ‘You are indeed among the reprieved
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ الْوَقْتِ الْمَعْلُومِ
english translation text:
until the day of the known time.’
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: قَالَ رَبِّ بِمَا أَغْوَيْتَنِي لَأُزَيِّنَنَّ لَهُمْ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَأُغْوِيَنَّهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘My Lord! As You have consigned me to perversity, I will surely glamorize [evil] for them on the earth, and I will surely pervert them, all
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: إِلَّا عِبَادَكَ مِنْهُمُ الْمُخْلَصِينَ
english translation text:
except Your dedicated servants among them.’
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: قَالَ هَٰذَا صِرَاطٌ عَلَيَّ مُسْتَقِيمٌ
english translation text:
He said, ‘This is the path [leading] straight to Me.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: إِنَّ عِبَادِي لَيْسَ لَكَ عَلَيْهِمْ سُلْطَانٌ إِلَّا مَنِ اتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ الْغَاوِينَ
english translation text:
Indeed, as for My servants you do not have any authority over them, except the perverse who follow you,
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَإِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ لَمَوْعِدُهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
english translation text:
and indeed hell is the tryst of them all.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: لَهَا سَبْعَةُ أَبْوَابٍ لِّكُلِّ بَابٍ مِّنْهُمْ جُزْءٌ مَّقْسُومٌ
english translation text:
It has seven gates, and to each gate belongs a separate portion of them.’
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: إِنَّ الْمُتَّقِينَ فِي جَنَّاتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
english translation text:
Indeed the Godwary will be amid gardens and springs.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: ادْخُلُوهَا بِسَلَامٍ آمِنِينَ
english translation text:
‘‘Enter it in peace and safety!’’
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَنَزَعْنَا مَا فِي صُدُورِهِم مِّنْ غِلٍّ إِخْوَانًا عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍ مُّتَقَابِلِينَ
english translation text:
We will remove whatever rancour there is in their breasts; [intimate like] brothers, [they will be reclining] on couches, facing one another.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: لَا يَمَسُّهُمْ فِيهَا نَصَبٌ وَمَا هُم مِّنْهَا بِمُخْرَجِينَ
english translation text:
Therein neither weariness shall touch them, nor will they [ever] be expelled from it.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: نَبِّئْ عِبَادِي أَنِّي أَنَا الْغَفُورُ الرَّحِيمُ
english translation text:
Inform my servants that I am indeed the All-forgiving, the All-merciful,
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَأَنَّ عَذَابِي هُوَ الْعَذَابُ الْأَلِيمُ
english translation text:
and that My punishment is a painful punishment.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ عَن ضَيْفِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ
english translation text:
And inform them about the guests of Abraham,
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: إِذْ دَخَلُوا عَلَيْهِ فَقَالُوا سَلَامًا قَالَ إِنَّا مِنكُمْ وَجِلُونَ
english translation text:
when they entered into his presence and said, ‘Peace!’ He said, ‘We are indeed afraid of you.’
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: قَالُوا لَا تَوْجَلْ إِنَّا نُبَشِّرُكَ بِغُلَامٍ عَلِيمٍ
english translation text:
They said, ‘Do not be afraid. Indeed we give you the good news of a wise son.’
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: قَالَ أَبَشَّرْتُمُونِي عَلَىٰ أَن مَّسَّنِيَ الْكِبَرُ فَبِمَ تُبَشِّرُونَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Do you give me good news though old age has befallen me? What is the good news that you bring me?’
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: قَالُوا بَشَّرْنَاكَ بِالْحَقِّ فَلَا تَكُن مِّنَ الْقَانِطِينَ
english translation text:
They said, ‘We bring you good news in truth; so do not be despondent.’
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: قَالَ وَمَن يَقْنَطُ مِن رَّحْمَةِ رَبِّهِ إِلَّا الضَّالُّونَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Who despairs of his Lord’s mercy except the astray?!’
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: قَالَ فَمَا خَطْبُكُمْ أَيُّهَا الْمُرْسَلُونَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘O messengers, what is now your errand?’
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: قَالُوا إِنَّا أُرْسِلْنَا إِلَىٰ قَوْمٍ مُّجْرِمِينَ
english translation text:
They said, ‘We have been sent toward a guilty people,
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: إِلَّا آلَ لُوطٍ إِنَّا لَمُنَجُّوهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
english translation text:
[who shall perish] except the family of Lot. We will indeed deliver all of them,
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: إِلَّا امْرَأَتَهُ قَدَّرْنَا ۙ إِنَّهَا لَمِنَ الْغَابِرِينَ
english translation text:
except his wife, [who], We have ordained, will indeed be among those who remain behind.’
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: فَلَمَّا جَاءَ آلَ لُوطٍ الْمُرْسَلُونَ
english translation text:
So when the messengers came to Lot’s family,
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: قَالَ إِنَّكُمْ قَوْمٌ مُّنكَرُونَ
english translation text:
he said, ‘You are indeed strangers [to me].’
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: قَالُوا بَلْ جِئْنَاكَ بِمَا كَانُوا فِيهِ يَمْتَرُونَ
english translation text:
They said, ‘Indeed, we bring you what they used to doubt.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَأَتَيْنَاكَ بِالْحَقِّ وَإِنَّا لَصَادِقُونَ
english translation text:
We bring you the truth, and indeed, we speak truly.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: فَأَسْرِ بِأَهْلِكَ بِقِطْعٍ مِّنَ اللَّيْلِ وَاتَّبِعْ أَدْبَارَهُمْ وَلَا يَلْتَفِتْ مِنكُمْ أَحَدٌ وَامْضُوا حَيْثُ تُؤْمَرُونَ
english translation text:
Take your family in a watch of the night; and follow in their rear, and none of you should turn round, and proceed as you are bidden.’
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَقَضَيْنَا إِلَيْهِ ذَٰلِكَ الْأَمْرَ أَنَّ دَابِرَ هَٰؤُلَاءِ مَقْطُوعٌ مُّصْبِحِينَ
english translation text:
We apprised him of the matter that these will be rooted out by dawn.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَجَاءَ أَهْلُ الْمَدِينَةِ يَسْتَبْشِرُونَ
english translation text:
The people of the city came, rejoicing.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: قَالَ إِنَّ هَٰؤُلَاءِ ضَيْفِي فَلَا تَفْضَحُونِ
english translation text:
He said, ‘These are indeed my guests. Do not bring dishonour on me.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَاتَّقُوا اللَّهَ وَلَا تُخْزُونِ
english translation text:
Be wary of Allah and do not humiliate me.’
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: قَالُوا أَوَلَمْ نَنْهَكَ عَنِ الْعَالَمِينَ
english translation text:
They said, ‘Did we not forbid you from [defending ] strangers?’
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: قَالَ هَٰؤُلَاءِ بَنَاتِي إِن كُنتُمْ فَاعِلِينَ
english translation text:
He said, ‘These are my daughters, [marry them] if you should do anything.’
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: لَعَمْرُكَ إِنَّهُمْ لَفِي سَكْرَتِهِمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
english translation text:
By your life, they were bewildered in their drunkenness.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ الصَّيْحَةُ مُشْرِقِينَ
english translation text:
So the Cry seized them at sunrise,
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: فَجَعَلْنَا عَالِيَهَا سَافِلَهَا وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حِجَارَةً مِّن سِجِّيلٍ
english translation text:
and We made its topmost part its nethermost, and rained on them stones of shale.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَاتٍ لِّلْمُتَوَسِّمِينَ
english translation text:
There are indeed signs in that for the percipient.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَإِنَّهَا لَبِسَبِيلٍ مُّقِيمٍ
english translation text:
Indeed it is on a standing road,
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَةً لِّلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text:
and there is indeed a sign in that for the faithful.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَإِن كَانَ أَصْحَابُ الْأَيْكَةِ لَظَالِمِينَ
english translation text:
Indeed the inhabitants of Aykah were [also] wrongdoers.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: فَانتَقَمْنَا مِنْهُمْ وَإِنَّهُمَا لَبِإِمَامٍ مُّبِينٍ
english translation text:
So We took vengeance on them, and indeed the two of them are on an open highway.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ كَذَّبَ أَصْحَابُ الْحِجْرِ الْمُرْسَلِينَ
english translation text:
Certainly the inhabitants of Hijr denied the apostles.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَآتَيْنَاهُمْ آيَاتِنَا فَكَانُوا عَنْهَا مُعْرِضِينَ
english translation text:
We had given them Our signs but they disregarded them.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَكَانُوا يَنْحِتُونَ مِنَ الْجِبَالِ بُيُوتًا آمِنِينَ
english translation text:
They used to hew out dwellings from mountains feeling secure.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ الصَّيْحَةُ مُصْبِحِينَ
english translation text:
So the Cry seized them at dawn,
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: فَمَا أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا يَكْسِبُونَ
english translation text:
and what they used to earn did not avail them.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا إِلَّا بِالْحَقِّ ۗ وَإِنَّ السَّاعَةَ لَآتِيَةٌ ۖ فَاصْفَحِ الصَّفْحَ الْجَمِيلَ
english translation text:
We did not create the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them except with consummate wisdom, and indeed the Hour is bound to come. So forbear with a graceful forbearance.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ الْخَلَّاقُ الْعَلِيمُ
english translation text:
Indeed your Lord is the All-creator, the All-knowing.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ آتَيْنَاكَ سَبْعًا مِّنَ الْمَثَانِي وَالْقُرْآنَ الْعَظِيمَ
english translation text:
Certainly We have given you [the surah of] the seven oft-repeated verses and the great Quran.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: لَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَيْنَيْكَ إِلَىٰ مَا مَتَّعْنَا بِهِ أَزْوَاجًا مِّنْهُمْ وَلَا تَحْزَنْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَاخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
english translation text:
Do not extend your glance toward what We have provided to certain groups of them, and do not grieve for them, and lower your wing to the faithful,
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَقُلْ إِنِّي أَنَا النَّذِيرُ الْمُبِينُ
english translation text:
and say, ‘I am indeed a manifest warner [of punishment from God],’
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: كَمَا أَنزَلْنَا عَلَى الْمُقْتَسِمِينَ
english translation text:
like that We sent down upon those who split into bands,
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: الَّذِينَ جَعَلُوا الْقُرْآنَ عِضِينَ
english translation text:
who represented the Quran as magic.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: فَوَرَبِّكَ لَنَسْأَلَنَّهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
english translation text:
By your Lord, We will question them all
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: عَمَّا كَانُوا يَعْمَلُونَ
english translation text:
concerning what they used to do.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: فَاصْدَعْ بِمَا تُؤْمَرُ وَأَعْرِضْ عَنِ الْمُشْرِكِينَ
english translation text:
So proclaim what you have been commanded, and turn away from the polytheists.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: إِنَّا كَفَيْنَاكَ الْمُسْتَهْزِئِينَ
english translation text:
Indeed We will suffice you against the deriders
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: الَّذِينَ يَجْعَلُونَ مَعَ اللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا آخَرَ ۚ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
english translation text:
—those who set up another deity besides Allah. Soon they will know!
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ نَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ يَضِيقُ صَدْرُكَ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ
english translation text:
Certainly We know that you become upset because of what they say.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَكُن مِّنَ السَّاجِدِينَ
english translation text:
So celebrate the praise of your Lord and be among those who prostrate,
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract

arabic text: وَاعْبُدْ رَبَّكَ حَتَّىٰ يَأْتِيَكَ الْيَقِينُ
english translation text:
and worship your Lord until certainty comes to you.
Al-Hijr – The Rocky Tract
